terms.name: Canonical Calendar
terms.definition: One authoritative time engine per institution

terms.name: Calendar Event
terms.definition: Scheduled occurrence on the institutional timeline

terms.name: Projection
terms.definition: Filtered view of the canonical calendar

terms.name: Conflict
terms.definition: Detectable overlap in time, resources, or travel

terms.name: Reservation
terms.definition: Time-bound resource allocation on canonical calendar

terms.name: Recurring Series
terms.definition: Pattern-based repeating events with versioned exceptions

terms.name: Travel Window
terms.definition: Computed travel, buffer, and preparation time

terms.name: Time Zone
terms.definition: Institution, human, and event temporal context

terms.name: External Sync
terms.definition: Bidirectional projection to external calendar systems

terms.name: Time Intelligence
terms.definition: Predictive analysis of schedule and deadline risk

terms.name: Time Block
terms.definition: Reserved period for focused work or recovery
